purpose: Second evidence-grounded multilingual taxonomy evaluator artifact bundle preserved as experiment history.

dataset_eval_summary.note: The original v2 folder did not ship a standalone dataset_summary.json. The lineage notebook has now been imported and the v2 fine-tuning path has been recovered into scripts, but a fresh full rerun is still pending.

files.metrics.json: Original recovered metric summary for v2.
files.best_thresholds.json: Original threshold array recovered from the local v2 folder.
files.best_thresholds_by_label.json: Derived convenience mapping created during repo cleanup using the canonical taxonomy order.
files.label_map.json: Derived index-to-label mapping created during repo cleanup using the canonical taxonomy order.

notes: This version is retained for history and comparison only.
label_map.json and best_thresholds_by_label.json were derived from the canonical taxonomy ordering already present in scripts/utils/schema.py.
Additional local-only files such as raw prediction exports remain in the ignored root import folder when present.
